steps.title: Identify what is added
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents stretching minutes, and $y$ represents walking minutes. Therefore, $x+y$ represents the total minutes spent on the two activities.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: In the equation $$x+y=90$$ the number $90$ is the total number of minutes spent stretching and walking each day. The answer is C.
